combos.notes: Simple 2-hit Light>Special confirm. L Power Charge +3/+4 oH. +30 KD
Basic Far-Light confirm into DP. +27 KD
Low string looping into +3 strike/throw but very unsafe oB -9.
Low string into Burn Knuckle. +30 KD / Light Auto Combo in Modern
Knocks down on hit (+29)
Requires CH/PC/DR or a juggle state for 5MP~HK to combo. Reference point for damage.
Link combo from Standing MK. +30 KD.

Classic Crouching MK > Fireball combo. Good for checking ankles. / 236LP is minus pointblank (-3 oH) but will combo from max 2MK range (+1 oH) / 236MP is safe (0 ~ +3 oH) but will not combo if too far. (-2 ~ 0 oB)

Faster and safer version of above combo, albeit w/ shorter range. / 236LP is minus pointblank (-3 oH) but will combo from max 2MP range (+4 oH). / 236MP is safe (0 ~ +5 oH) but will not combo if too far. (0 ~ +1 oB)
Easy combo from 2MK target combo. +30 KD.
BnB from 2MK target combo. Delay 623HP or it will whiff if you are not in the corner. +27 KD.
Power Charge must connect at max range to link into 2LP. Builds 1/4 SA Gauge.
Simple confirm into Buster Wolf. / Medium Auto Combo in Modern
Double Buster Wolf route
Optimal Cash out combo w/o CA. Will use ALL resources so hope it kills.
Variation of above combo using SA3. Optimal w/ Critical Art.
Corner Carry Combo. +44 KD

BNB variant for +21 meterless oki but slightly lower damage. Dash forward into +2 strike/throw even if opponent recovers backward. / Delay Crack Shoot for all three hits to connect. 214LP ender will drop if Crack Shoot is not delayed.
Bread & Butter Combo. +27 KD / Delay Crack Shoot for all three hits to connect. Deals 2460 damage with only two hits of Crack Shoot.
Corner BnB using Round Wave. +27 KD / Delay Rising Tackle for more damage.
Slightly more difficult variant of Corner BnB for extra damage. +27 KD
DR extension off of 236HK. +25 KD / Power Wave and DR~5MP must be delayed or combo can drop.
Basic driveless combo into Buster Wolf. / Can also use M Crackshoot for less damage (2960) but no need for a delay.
DR extension off of 236HK into Buster Wolf. / Power Wave and DR~5MP must be delayed or combo can drop.
OD Crackshoot Adds another 600 dmg.
Bread & Butter w/ a cherry on top [Rising Fang (SA3)]. / Heavy Auto Combo in Modern.

Optimal midscreen full meter dump combo. In order for the link to DR~2MP to work, you must delay cancel 236HP by 4-5 frames. Can replace 2MP with 5MP, but you must delay cancel by exactly 4 frames, so it is much harder, for only minimal extra damage. / 5892 with j.HK starter
Optimal full meter dump corner combo, not including PC DR~2HP starter.
3 Super stock combo using Rising Fang (SA3) w/ CA.
3 Super stock combo using Triple Geyser (SA2++) instead when w/o CA.
Forget your combo? Target Combo has your back. +25 KD.
Forget your combo AND out of 5MP range? DR Target Combo has your back. +25 KD.
Are you okay? / Alternatively, 2MP>236MK for slightly less damage.
Doesn't work after Drive Rush, but works at most ranges. +28 KD.
Power Charge loop into SA3 Cash out combo. Builds 1/2 SA Gauge.
Big boy cashout combo for a reversal punish (or a PC DI if you do DR>5HP at the start) without CA at your disposal. You can replace the first link to 2HP to 2MP for a 4 frame window.
Above but with CA now. Comically large amounts of damage. / Replacing dl.2HP onwards with 2HP>236HK, 214LP>236236P nets 6225 damage.
BnB corner combo to really cash out. You should let 5HP hit twice in all instances here. Many enders possible after 5LP (236MK > 214214P(SA2)~PP~PP for lvl2)
More situational - useful after a whiffed DP to really maximize damage. / Can be extended to use CA but this will do ~50 or so less damage.
Forget your punish? Here's a Power Dunk Target Combo. Frame Perfect adds 100 dmg. +25 KD
Corner Carry Combo. +44 KD
Bread & Butter Combo. +27 KD
OD Crack Shoot adds 500 dmg +27 KD
Drive Impact combo into SA1.
Drive Impact combo into SA3.
Forget your punish? Here's a Power Dunk Target Combo. +25 KD
Basic meterless combo from wallsplat. +27 KD
Basic SA1 combo from Wallsplat.
"Double Wolf" combo. SA1 must come out right as you recover from OD Power Wave for the second SA1 to juggle.
Wallsplat > SA2 combo. +27 KD
2-Bar Cashout Combo from Wallsplat.
Full cashout combo from wallsplat. Needs all 6 Drive Gauge bars.
Version of previous combo that still uses all Drive Bars but works if you start with 4. More practical but does less damage.
Simple Combo starting with 5MP
DRC cashout with 2MK
Common heavy combo structure. If you delay Rising Tackle you can get more damage.
Optimal 3 Super stock combo using Triple Geyser (SA2++) instead when w/o CA.
